title: clutia hirsuta
intro: Clutia hirsuta, also known as the hairy clutia, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clutia hirsuta include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Clutia hirsuta include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
